blocks.content: Ryan started walking Daisy to English.
Kit found out because Ryan was already at her locker one morning — talking to her, easy, like it wasn't a question — and Kit came around the corner and stopped.
They hadn't seen him. Daisy was laughing at something. Ryan was leaning on the locker next to hers.
Kit kept walking and went to his own locker by a different route.
In homeroom, Daisy slid into her seat.
She opened her notebook. The teacher came in. The morning moved on.
Kit stared at the front of the room and thought about nothing.
